items.name: Black Duffle
items.description:
Rep the blur. This duffle brings that nostalgic 2000s energy with modern execution. The distorted branding and striped pocket details give it that authentic throwback feel while keeping it fresh. Whether you're heading to practice, a hangout, or just flexing your style, this bag completes the look.

Available in Black, White, and Red
